allow: Bash(python -c "import main_gui; print\('语法检查通过'\)")

Bash(python -c "import ast; tree = ast.parse\(open\('main_gui.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); methods = [n.name for n in ast.walk\(tree\) if isinstance\(n, ast.FunctionDef\)]; print\('Methods found:', len\(methods\)\); print\('_clear_layout' in methods\)")

Bash(awk 'NR>=7600 && NR<=7750 && /^def /{print NR": "$0}' e:/python/南网解析工具/protocol_parser.py)
